609 X0400_CRCTN_BIRTH_DT X0400_CRCTN_BIRTH_DT X0400 Correction Birth Date CHAR 8 The data in this column indicates the resident's birth date from the prior erroneous record to be modified or inactivated. effective 10/01/2023
